nasb.text: He said to them, “Look at me and do likewise. And behold, when I come to the outskirts of the camp, do as I do.

esv.text: And he said to them, “Look at me, and do likewise. When I come to the outskirts of the camp, do as I do.

cnv.text: 然後對他們說：“你們要看著我，也要照樣行事。注意！我到了營的邊緣，我怎樣行事，你們也要怎樣行事。

ccb.text: 对他们说：“你们要看我的行动，当我们走到敌营旁边时，我怎么做，你们也要怎么做。
